passage_title: Reducing the Effects of Climate Change

sentences.sentence: Such is our dependence on fossil fuels, and such is the volume of carbon dioxide already released into the atmosphere, that many experts agree that significant global warming is now inevitable.
sentences.translation: 我们对化石燃料的依赖如此之深，已经排放到大气中的二氧化碳量又如此之大，以至于许多专家都认为，严重的全球变暖如今已不可避免。

structure.text: Such is our dependence on fossil fuels
and such is the volume of carbon dioxide already released into the atmosphere
already released into the atmosphere
that many experts agree
that significant global warming is now inevitable

difficult_points: 两个 Such is... 都是将表语置于句首的倒装结构，并共同与 that 构成 such... that... 结果结构。
already released into the atmosphere 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 carbon dioxide。
第二个 that 引导 agree 的宾语从句，说明专家一致认同的内容。

sentences.sentence: They believe that the best we can do is keep it at a reasonable level, and at present the only serious option for doing this is cutting back on our carbon emissions.
sentences.translation: 他们认为，我们能做的最好事情就是把变暖控制在合理水平，而目前实现这一目标唯一可认真考虑的办法，就是减少碳排放。

structure.text: They believe
that the best we can do is keep it at a reasonable level
we can do
and at present the only serious option for doing this is cutting back on our carbon emissions
cutting back on our carbon emissions

difficult_points: the best 后省略关系代词 that，we can do 是修饰 the best 的定语从句。
第一个 it 指 significant global warming，doing this 指把变暖维持在合理水平。
cutting back on... 是动名词短语，在系动词 is 后作表语。

expressions.text: keep it at a reasonable level

expressions.meaning_zh: 唯一可认真考虑的选择

sentences.sentence: But while a few countries are making major strides in this regard, the majority are having great difficulty even stemming the rate of increase, let alone reversing it.
sentences.translation: 然而，虽然少数国家在这方面取得了长足进展，大多数国家甚至连遏制增长速度都非常困难，更不用说扭转这一趋势了。

structure.text: while a few countries are making major strides in this regard
the majority
are having great difficulty
even stemming the rate of increase
let alone reversing it

difficult_points: while 引导让步从句，表示少数国家的进展与多数国家的困难形成对照。
have difficulty doing 是固定结构，stemming 是动名词。
let alone 表示递进的否定，it 指代 the rate of increase 所体现的增长趋势。

sentences.sentence: Consequently, an increasing number of scientists are beginning to explore the alternative of geo-engineering - a term which generally refers to the intentional large-scale manipulation of the environment.
sentences.translation: 因此，越来越多的科学家开始探索地球工程这一替代方案——这个术语通常指有意对环境进行大规模操控。

structure.text: Consequently
an increasing number of scientists
are beginning to explore the alternative of geo-engineering
a term
which generally refers to the intentional large-scale manipulation of the environment

difficult_points: 破折号后的 a term 是 geo-engineering 的同位语。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，进一步界定 geo-engineering 的含义。
an increasing number of 表示数量持续增加，谓语与复数 scientists 一致。

sentences.sentence: According to its proponents, geo-engineering is the equivalent of a backup generator: if Plan A - reducing our dependency on fossil fuels – fails, we require a Plan B, employing grand schemes to slow down or reverse the process of global warming.
sentences.translation: 地球工程的支持者认为，它相当于一台备用发电机：如果 A 计划——减少我们对化石燃料的依赖——失败，我们就需要 B 计划，采用宏大的方案来减缓或扭转全球变暖的进程。

structure.text: According to its proponents
geo-engineering is the equivalent of a backup generator
if Plan A - reducing our dependency on fossil fuels – fails
reducing our dependency on fossil fuels
we require a Plan B
employing grand schemes to slow down or reverse the process of global warming

difficult_points: 冒号后的 if 条件句具体解释 backup generator 这一比喻。
reducing... 是 Plan A 的同位说明，位于两个破折号之间。
employing... 是现在分词短语，补充说明 Plan B 所采用的手段。

expressions.text: slow down or reverse the process

sentences.sentence: Geo-engineering has been shown to work, at least on a small localised scale.
sentences.translation: 事实已经证明，地球工程是有效的，至少在小范围的局部层面如此。

structure.text: Geo-engineering
has been shown
to work
at least on a small localised scale

difficult_points: has been shown 是现在完成时的被动语态，表示已有证据证明。
to work 是主语补足语，说明地球工程被证明具有成效。

sentences.sentence: For decades, May Day parades in Moscow have taken place under clear blue skies, aircraft having deposited dry ice, silver iodide and cement powder to disperse clouds.
sentences.translation: 几十年来，莫斯科的五一游行一直在晴朗的蓝天下举行，因为飞机会投放干冰、碘化银和水泥粉来驱散云层。

structure.text: For decades
May Day parades in Moscow
have taken place under clear blue skies
aircraft having deposited dry ice, silver iodide and cement powder
to disperse clouds

difficult_points: aircraft having deposited... 是独立主格结构，为游行时的晴空补充原因背景。
having deposited 使用完成式分词，表示投放发生在形成晴朗天空之前。
to disperse clouds 是目的状语，说明投放这些物质的目的。

sentences.sentence: Many of the schemes now suggested look to do the opposite, and reduce the amount of sunlight reaching the planet.
sentences.translation: 如今提出的许多方案试图反其道而行之，减少到达地球的阳光量。

structure.text: Many of the schemes now suggested
now suggested
look to do the opposite
and reduce the amount of sunlight reaching the planet
reaching the planet

difficult_points: now suggested 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 schemes。
reaching the planet 是现在分词短语，后置修饰 sunlight。
do the opposite 指与驱散云层、增加晴空的做法相反，即减少阳光。

sentences.sentence: The most eye-catching idea of all is suggested by Professor Roger Angel of the University of Arizona.
sentences.translation: 所有方案中最引人注目的构想，是由亚利桑那大学的罗杰·安杰尔教授提出的。

structure.text: The most eye-catching idea of all
is suggested
by Professor Roger Angel of the University of Arizona

difficult_points: is suggested 是一般现在时的被动语态，突出构想而非提出者。
of all 限定最高级，表示这是所有构想中最引人注目的一个。

sentences.sentence: His scheme would employ up to 16 trillion minute spacecraft, each weighing about one gram, to form a transparent, sunlight-refracting sunshade in an orbit 1.5 million km above the Earth.
sentences.translation: 他的方案将动用多达 16 万亿个微型航天器，每个重约一克，在地球上方 150 万公里的轨道上形成一道透明、能折射阳光的遮阳屏。

structure.text: His scheme
would employ up to 16 trillion minute spacecraft
each weighing about one gram
to form a transparent, sunlight-refracting sunshade
in an orbit 1.5 million km above the Earth

difficult_points: minute 在此是形容词，意为“微小的”，而不是时间单位“分钟”。
each weighing about one gram 是独立主格结构，补充每个航天器的重量。
to form... 表目的，sunlight-refracting 是复合形容词，意为“折射阳光的”。

sentences.sentence: This could, argues Angel, reduce the amount of light reaching the Earth by two per cent.
sentences.translation: 安杰尔认为，这可以使到达地球的光线量减少百分之二。

structure.text: This could
argues Angel
reduce the amount of light reaching the Earth by two per cent
reaching the Earth

difficult_points: argues Angel 是插入性的引述语，主谓倒装，不影响主句 This could reduce... 的结构。
reaching the Earth 是现在分词短语，后置修饰 light。
by two per cent 中 by 表示减少的幅度，而非减少后的最终数值。

sentences.sentence: The majority of geo-engineering projects so far carried out - which include planting forests in deserts and depositing iron in the ocean to stimulate the growth of algae - have focused on achieving a general cooling of the Earth.
sentences.translation: 迄今实施的大多数地球工程项目——包括在沙漠中植树，以及向海洋投放铁以促进藻类生长——都着眼于实现地球整体降温。

structure.text: The majority of geo-engineering projects so far carried out
so far carried out
which include planting forests in deserts and depositing iron in the ocean to stimulate the growth of algae
to stimulate the growth of algae
have focused on achieving a general cooling of the Earth

difficult_points: so far carried out 是过去分词短语，修饰 projects，表示迄今已实施的项目。
两个破折号之间的 which 从句补充项目实例，主句谓语是 have focused。
to stimulate... 表示向海中投放铁的目的。

expressions.text: a general cooling of the Earth

sentences.sentence: But some look specifically at reversing the melting at the poles, particularly the Arctic.
sentences.translation: 但有些项目专门关注如何扭转极地、尤其是北极的融化。

structure.text: some
look specifically at reversing the melting at the poles
reversing the melting at the poles
particularly the Arctic

difficult_points: some 代指 some geo-engineering projects，避免重复前句名词。
look at 后接动名词 reversing，表示研究或考虑如何扭转融化。
particularly the Arctic 是对 the poles 的进一步聚焦。

sentences.sentence: The reasoning is that if you replenish the ice sheets and frozen waters of the high latitudes, more light will be reflected back into space, so reducing the warming of the oceans and atmosphere.
sentences.translation: 其逻辑是，如果补充高纬度地区的冰盖和冰冻水域，就会有更多光线反射回太空，从而减缓海洋和大气升温。

structure.text: The reasoning is
that if you replenish the ice sheets and frozen waters of the high latitudes, more light will be reflected back into space
if you replenish the ice sheets and frozen waters of the high latitudes
more light will be reflected back into space
so reducing the warming of the oceans and atmosphere

difficult_points: that 引导表语从句，解释这种方案背后的推理。
表语从句内部含 if 条件句，主句使用 will be reflected 的被动语态。
so reducing... 是结果性的现在分词结构，so 相当于“从而”。

sentences.sentence: The concept of releasing aerosol sprays into the stratosphere above the Arctic has been proposed by several scientists.
sentences.translation: 几位科学家已经提出了向北极上空平流层释放气溶胶喷雾的构想。

structure.text: The concept of releasing aerosol sprays into the stratosphere above the Arctic
of releasing aerosol sprays into the stratosphere above the Arctic
has been proposed
by several scientists

difficult_points: of releasing... 修饰 concept，说明构想的具体内容。
has been proposed 是现在完成时的被动语态，强调该构想已经被提出。

sentences.sentence: This would involve using sulphur or hydrogen sulphide aerosols so that sulphur dioxide would form clouds, which would, in turn, lead to a global dimming.
sentences.translation: 这将涉及使用硫或硫化氢气溶胶，使二氧化硫形成云层，而这又会导致全球变暗。

structure.text: This would involve using sulphur or hydrogen sulphide aerosols
using sulphur or hydrogen sulphide aerosols
so that sulphur dioxide would form clouds
which would, in turn, lead to a global dimming

difficult_points: involve 后接动名词 using，说明该方案所包含的操作。
so that 引导目的或结果从句，说明使用气溶胶会促使二氧化硫成云。
which 回指前述形成的 clouds 或整个成云过程，in turn 表示后续连锁结果。

sentences.sentence: The idea is modelled on historic volcanic explosions, such as that of Mount Pinatubo in the Philippines in 1991, which led to a short-term cooling of global temperatures by 0.5 °C.
sentences.translation: 这一构想以历史上的火山喷发为模型，例如 1991 年菲律宾皮纳图博火山的喷发；那次喷发曾使全球气温短期下降 0.5 摄氏度。

structure.text: The idea
is modelled on historic volcanic explosions
such as that of Mount Pinatubo in the Philippines in 1991
which led to a short-term cooling of global temperatures by 0.5 °C

difficult_points: be modelled on 表示该构想以历史火山喷发为参照模型。
that 代替 volcanic explosion，避免重复，具体指皮纳图博火山喷发。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，说明该次喷发造成的降温结果。

sentences.sentence: Scientists have also scrutinised whether it's possible to preserve the ice sheets of Greenland with reinforced high-tension cables, preventing icebergs from moving into the sea.
sentences.translation: 科学家还仔细研究过，是否可以用加固的高强度缆索保护格陵兰冰盖，防止冰山移入海中。

structure.text: Scientists
have also scrutinised
whether it's possible to preserve the ice sheets of Greenland with reinforced high-tension cables
to preserve the ice sheets of Greenland with reinforced high-tension cables
preventing icebergs from moving into the sea

difficult_points: whether 引导 scrutinised 的宾语从句，表示研究这一做法是否可行。
it 是形式主语，真正的主语是 to preserve...。
preventing... 是结果或方式性的现在分词短语，prevent A from doing 表示阻止 A 做某事。

sentences.sentence: Meanwhile in the Russian Arctic, geo-engineering plans include the planting of millions of birch trees.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，在俄罗斯北极地区，地球工程计划包括种植数百万棵白桦树。

structure.text: Meanwhile in the Russian Arctic
geo-engineering plans
include
the planting of millions of birch trees

difficult_points: Meanwhile 表示叙述转向同时存在的另一项地球工程方案。
the planting of... 是名词化结构，作 include 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: Whereas the region's native evergreen pines shade the snow and absorb radiation, birches would shed their leaves in winter, thus enabling radiation to be reflected by the snow.
sentences.translation: 当地原生的常绿松树会遮蔽积雪并吸收辐射，而白桦树会在冬季落叶，从而使辐射能够被积雪反射。

structure.text: Whereas the region's native evergreen pines shade the snow and absorb radiation
birches
would shed their leaves in winter
thus enabling radiation to be reflected by the snow
radiation to be reflected by the snow

difficult_points: Whereas 引导对比从句，将常绿松树与白桦树对辐射的不同影响相比较。
shade 与 absorb 是共用主语 pines 的并列谓语。
thus enabling... 是结果性分词短语，其中 radiation 是 enabling 的宾语，to be reflected 是宾补。

sentences.sentence: Re-routing Russian rivers to increase cold water flow to ice-forming areas could also be used to slow down warming, say some climate scientists.
sentences.translation: 一些气候科学家表示，还可以改变俄罗斯河流的流向，增加流往结冰区域的冷水，以减缓变暖。

structure.text: Re-routing Russian rivers to increase cold water flow to ice-forming areas
to increase cold water flow to ice-forming areas
could also be used
to slow down warming
say some climate scientists

difficult_points: Re-routing... 是动名词短语，整体作句子主语。
两个不定式分别说明改道的直接目的和这种手段的最终用途。
say some climate scientists 是置于句末的倒装引述语。

sentences.sentence: But will such schemes ever be implemented?
sentences.translation: 但是，这些方案究竟会付诸实施吗？

structure.text: will
such schemes
ever be implemented

difficult_points: 这是一般疑问句，助动词 will 置于主语 such schemes 之前。
be implemented 是被动语态，ever 加强“究竟是否会有一天”的疑问语气。

sentences.sentence: Generally speaking, those who are most cautious about geo-engineering are the scientists involved in the research.
sentences.translation: 一般来说，对地球工程最为谨慎的，正是参与这项研究的科学家。

structure.text: Generally speaking
those who are most cautious about geo-engineering
who are most cautious about geo-engineering
are
the scientists involved in the research
involved in the research

difficult_points: those who... 表示“那些……的人”，who 从句限定 those。
involved in the research 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 scientists。
主语和表语都指人，句子强调最谨慎者恰恰是研究参与者。

sentences.sentence: Angel says that his plan is 'no substitute for developing renewable energy: the only permanent solution'.
sentences.translation: 安杰尔说，他的方案“不能替代发展可再生能源；后者才是唯一的永久解决办法”。

structure.text: Angel says
that his plan is 'no substitute for developing renewable energy: the only permanent solution'
developing renewable energy
the only permanent solution

difficult_points: that 引导 says 的宾语从句。
no substitute for 后接动名词 developing，表示“不能替代发展……”。
冒号后的 the only permanent solution 是 renewable energy 的同位说明。

sentences.sentence: And Dr Phil Rasch of the US-based Pacific Northwest National Laboratory is equally guarded about the role of geo-engineering: 'I think all of us agree that if we were to end geo-engineering on a given day, then the planet would return to its pre-engineered condition very rapidly, and probably within ten to twenty years.
sentences.translation: 美国太平洋西北国家实验室的菲尔·拉施博士对地球工程的作用也同样谨慎：“我想我们都同意，如果我们在某一天停止地球工程，那么地球会很快恢复到实施工程前的状态，而且可能只需十到二十年。

structure.text: Dr Phil Rasch of the US-based Pacific Northwest National Laboratory
is equally guarded about the role of geo-engineering
I think
all of us agree
that if we were to end geo-engineering on a given day, then the planet would return to its pre-engineered condition very rapidly
if we were to end geo-engineering on a given day
and probably within ten to twenty years

difficult_points: 冒号后是拉施的直接引语，I think 后又嵌套 agree 的宾语内容。
if we were to... 使用 were to 表示假设性较强的未来条件。
would return 与假设条件呼应，its pre-engineered condition 指实施地球工程之前的状态。
本句引语尚未结束，结束引号保留在下一句原文中。

expressions.meaning_zh: 恢复到工程实施前的状态

sentences.sentence: That's certainly something to worry about.'
sentences.translation: 这当然是值得担忧的事情。”

structure.text: That's certainly something to worry about
something to worry about
to worry about

difficult_points: That 回指一旦停止地球工程，地球会迅速恢复原状这一后果。
to worry about 是不定式短语，后置修饰 something，介词 about 保留在句末。

sentences.sentence: The US National Center for Atmospheric Research has already suggested that the proposal to inject sulphur into the atmosphere might affect rainfall patterns across the tropics and the Southern Ocean.
sentences.translation: 美国国家大气研究中心已经指出，向大气中注入硫的提案可能会影响整个热带地区和南大洋的降雨模式。

structure.text: The US National Center for Atmospheric Research
has already suggested
that the proposal to inject sulphur into the atmosphere might affect rainfall patterns across the tropics and the Southern Ocean
to inject sulphur into the atmosphere
might affect rainfall patterns across the tropics and the Southern Ocean

difficult_points: that 引导 suggested 的宾语从句，might 表示尚不确定但存在的风险。
to inject... 是不定式短语，后置说明 proposal 的具体内容。
across 同时覆盖 the tropics 和 the Southern Ocean 两个区域。

sentences.sentence: 'Geo-engineering plans to inject stratospheric aerosols or to seed clouds would act to cool the planet, and act to increase the extent of sea ice,' says Rasch.
sentences.translation: 拉施说：“向平流层注入气溶胶或播云的地球工程计划，会起到使地球降温并扩大海冰范围的作用。”

structure.text: Geo-engineering plans to inject stratospheric aerosols or to seed clouds
to inject stratospheric aerosols or to seed clouds
would act to cool the planet
and act to increase the extent of sea ice
says Rasch

difficult_points: plans 后的两个并列不定式说明地球工程计划的具体内容。
两个 act to... 共用主语，分别说明降温和扩大海冰范围两项作用。
says Rasch 是直接引语后的倒装引述结构。

expressions.meaning_zh: 起到使地球降温的作用

expressions.text: increase the extent of sea ice

sentences.sentence: 'But all the models suggest some impact on the distribution of precipitation.'
sentences.translation: “但所有模型都表明，这会对降水分布产生一定影响。”

structure.text: all the models
suggest
some impact on the distribution of precipitation

difficult_points: suggest 在此意为研究模型“表明”，而不是“建议”。
some impact 表示存在一定程度的影响，但未明确影响的方向或大小。

sentences.sentence: 'A further risk with geo-engineering projects is that you can "overshoot",' says Dr Dan Lunt, from the University of Bristol's School of Geophysical Sciences, who has studied the likely impacts of the sunshade and aerosol schemes on the climate.
sentences.translation: 布里斯托大学地球物理科学学院的丹·伦特博士说：“地球工程项目的另一个风险是可能会‘矫枉过正’。”他研究过遮阳屏和气溶胶方案可能对气候产生的影响。

structure.text: A further risk with geo-engineering projects is
that you can "overshoot"
says Dr Dan Lunt
from the University of Bristol's School of Geophysical Sciences
who has studied the likely impacts of the sunshade and aerosol schemes on the climate

difficult_points: that 引导表语从句，解释 further risk 的具体内容。
overshoot 在此指干预超过所需程度，导致气候指标越过目标值。
who 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 Dr Dan Lunt，说明其研究背景。

sentences.sentence: 'You may bring global temperatures back to pre-industrial levels, but the risk is that the poles will still be warmer than they should be and the tropics will be cooler than before industrialisation.
sentences.translation: “你或许能让全球气温回到工业化前的水平，但风险在于，两极仍会比应有的温度更暖，而热带地区则会比工业化前更冷。

structure.text: You may bring global temperatures back to pre-industrial levels
but the risk is
that the poles will still be warmer than they should be and the tropics will be cooler than before industrialisation
the poles will still be warmer than they should be
and the tropics will be cooler than before industrialisation

difficult_points: bring... back to... 表示使全球气温恢复到某一历史水平。
that 引导表语从句，具体说明即使全球平均气温复原仍会存在的区域失衡。
than they should be 中 should be 后省略 warmer 所比较的温度状态。
本句直接引语尚未闭合，结束引号位于下一句末尾。

sentences.sentence: To avoid such a scenario, Lunt says Angel's project would have to operate at half strength; all of which reinforces his view that the best option is to avoid the need for geo-engineering altogether.'
sentences.translation: 为避免这种局面，伦特说，安杰尔的项目必须以一半强度运行；这一切都进一步印证了他的观点，即最佳选择是从根本上避免对地球工程产生需求。”

structure.text: To avoid such a scenario
Lunt says
Angel's project would have to operate at half strength
all of which reinforces his view
that the best option is to avoid the need for geo-engineering altogether
to avoid the need for geo-engineering altogether

difficult_points: 句首不定式 To avoid... 表目的，说明降低运行强度所要避免的局面。
分号后的 all of which 中 which 回指前述整套风险与限制。
that 引导 view 的同位语从句，说明伦特观点的具体内容。
altogether 修饰 avoid，强调彻底避免产生使用地球工程的必要。

sentences.sentence: The main reason why geo-engineering is supported by many in the scientific community is that most researchers have little faith in the ability of politicians to agree - and then bring in - the necessary carbon cuts.
sentences.translation: 地球工程得到科学界许多人支持的主要原因是，大多数研究人员不太相信政治家有能力就必要的碳减排措施达成一致，并随后将其付诸实施。

structure.text: The main reason why geo-engineering is supported by many in the scientific community
why geo-engineering is supported by many in the scientific community
is
that most researchers have little faith in the ability of politicians to agree - and then bring in - the necessary carbon cuts
to agree - and then bring in - the necessary carbon cuts

difficult_points: why 引导定语从句修饰 reason，that 引导表语从句说明具体原因。
have little faith in 表示对某种能力几乎没有信心。
to agree 和 bring in 是与 politicians 相关的并列动作，bring in 在此指推行减排措施。
the necessary carbon cuts 同时是 agree 所针对的事项和 bring in 的宾语。

expressions.text: bring in the necessary carbon cuts
expressions.meaning_zh: 推行必要的碳减排措施

sentences.sentence: Even leading conservation organisations see the value of investigating the potential of geo-engineering.
sentences.translation: 就连主要的自然保护组织也认为，研究地球工程的潜力是有价值的。

structure.text: Even leading conservation organisations
see the value of
investigating the potential of geo-engineering

difficult_points: Even 强调连通常立场谨慎的主要保护组织也认可研究价值。
of 后接动名词 investigating，说明这种 value 具体在于什么。

sentences.sentence: According to Dr Martin Sommerkorn, climate change advisor for the World Wildlife Fund's International Arctic Programme, 'Human-induced climate change has brought humanity to a position where we shouldn't exclude thinking thoroughly about this topic and its possibilities.'
sentences.translation: 世界自然基金会国际北极项目的气候变化顾问马丁·索默科恩博士表示：“人为引起的气候变化已经把人类带到这样一种境地：我们不应排除对这个议题及其各种可能性进行深入思考。”

structure.text: According to Dr Martin Sommerkorn
climate change advisor for the World Wildlife Fund's International Arctic Programme
Human-induced climate change
has brought humanity to a position
where we shouldn't exclude thinking thoroughly about this topic and its possibilities
thinking thoroughly about this topic and its possibilities

difficult_points: climate change advisor... 是 Dr Martin Sommerkorn 的同位语，交代其身份。
has brought humanity to a position 使用现在完成时，强调气候变化已造成的当前处境。
where 引导定语从句修饰 position，表示“在这种处境下”。
exclude 后接动名词 thinking，shouldn't exclude 意为“不应排除”。
